slides.hook: The Challenge of AI Agent Communication
slides.body: AI agents are rapidly proliferating, but their ability to communicate and interoperate remains a significant hurdle. Current agents operate in closed environments, lacking standardization for seamless interaction.
slides.visual_direction: Minimalistic layout. Black background, white text. Left-aligned body. A subtle blue corner element. Right-pointing arrow.
slides.source_topic_headline: DARPA Wants AI Agents to Talk to Each Other — and Nobody Has Figured Out How Yet

slides.body: HubSpot is shifting its strategy, betting its future on AI agents. These autonomous software entities are expected to become primary users of CRM software, performing tasks and interacting with customers independently.
slides.visual_direction: Minimalistic layout. Black background, white text. Left-aligned body. A subtle orange corner element. Right-pointing arrow.
slides.source_topic_headline: HubSpot Goes All-In on AI Agents and Ditches Its Own Conference to Prove It
